common.description: A multilingual campus community for students, courses, and collaboration.

confirm.title: Confirm action
confirm.message: Are you sure you want to continue?

error.title: Action failed
error.message: The action could not be completed. Please try again.

errors.required: Please enter both username and password.
errors.invalid: Incorrect username or password. Please try again.

register.title: Join us
register.subtitle: Create your UniKorn account
register.emailHintTitle: Only HKUST-GZ email domains are allowed:
register.verificationNotice: We will send a verification code to your email after registration. Please make sure the address is correct.
register.verificationWarningBody: If you cannot find the verification email, please check your spam or junk folders.
register.success: Email verification succeeded. Your account is now ready to use.

errors.usernameMin: Username must be at least 2 characters.
errors.usernameMax: Username must be at most 50 characters.
errors.usernameForbidden: Username cannot include reserved special symbols. Please use letters, numbers, underscores, or standard characters.
errors.usernameTaken: This username is already in use.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.emailDomain: Only HKUST-GZ email addresses are allowed. The domain must be connect.hkust-gz.edu.cn or hkust-gz.edu.cn.
errors.emailTaken: This email has already been registered.
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.confirmMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
errors.registerFailed: Registration failed. Please try again later.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.emailHint: Please use the HKUST-GZ email address linked to your account.
forgotPassword.sentDescription: We have sent a password reset link to {email}.
forgotPassword.stepOne: Check your inbox, including the spam folder.
forgotPassword.stepTwo: Open the reset link from the email.
forgotPassword.goToRegister: Don’t have an account? Register now

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid HKUST-GZ email address.
errors.sendFailed: Failed to send the reset email. Please try again.
errors.resendFailed: Failed to resend the email. Please try again.

success.resent: The reset link has been sent again. Please check your inbox.

profileRedirect.missingAuth: We could not find your login information. Redirecting to the login page...

courses.reviewsCopy: Ratings and reviews for {offering} are here.
courses.discussionEmpty: No discussion yet. Be the first to post.
courses.homeDescription: View the course overview, review entry, and discussion area for {offering} {course}.
courses.offeringMissing: This offering does not exist for the selected course.
courses.pageIntro: This page shows reviews for {courseCode} in {offering}.
courses.reviewContentPlaceholder: Share your experience with the workload, assignments, exams, and overall learning experience for this offering...
courses.uploadDragText: Click or drag images here to upload
courses.loginHint: Please log in before posting a review.
courses.reviewEmpty: There are no course reviews for this offering yet. Be the first to share your experience.

errors.submitReview: Failed to publish the review. Please try again.
